16 #pragma pack(1)

18 // AVI infoframe
19 #define HDMI_EC_XVYCC601 0x00
20 #define HDMI_EC_XVYCC709 0x01
21 #define HDMI_EC_SYCC601 0x02
22 #define HDMI_EC_ADOBEYCC601 0x03
23 #define HDMI_EC_ADOBERGB 0x04
24 #define HDMI_EC_BT2020C 0x05
25 #define HDMI_EC_BT2020 0x06
26 
27 #define HDMI_YQ_LIMITED_RANGE 0x00
28 #define HDMI_YQ_FULL_RANGE 0x01
29 
30 #define HDMI_CN_NONE_OR_GRAPHICS 0x00
31 #define HDMI_CN_PHOTO 0x01
32 #define HDMI_CN_CINEMA 0x02
33 #define HDMI_CN_GAME 0x03
34 
35 typedef struct _HDMI_VIC_FORMAT {
36  WORD cx;
37  WORD cy;
38  BOOLEAN bInterlaced;
39  WORD wAspectX;
40  WORD wAspectY;
41  DWORD dwFrameDuration;
42 } HDMI_VIC_FORMAT;
43 
44 static const HDMI_VIC_FORMAT g_aHDMIVICFormats[] = {
45  /* 0 */ 0, 0, FALSE, 0, 0, 0,
46  /* 1 */ 640, 480, FALSE, 4, 3, 166667,
47  /* 2 */ 720, 480, FALSE, 4, 3, 166667,
48  /* 3 */ 720, 480, FALSE, 16, 9, 166667,
49  /* 4 */ 1280, 720, FALSE, 16, 9, 166667,
50  /* 5 */ 1920, 1080, TRUE, 16, 9, 333333,
51  /* 6 */ 720, 480, TRUE, 4, 3, 333333,
52  /* 7 */ 720, 480, TRUE, 16, 9, 333333,
53  /* 8 */ 720, 240, FALSE, 4, 3, 166667,
54  /* 9 */ 720, 240, FALSE, 16, 9, 166667,
55  /* 10 */ 2880, 480, TRUE, 4, 3, 333333,
56  /* 11 */ 2880, 480, TRUE, 16, 9, 333333,
57  /* 12 */ 2880, 240, FALSE, 4, 3, 166667,
58  /* 13 */ 2880, 240, FALSE, 16, 9, 166667,
59  /* 14 */ 1440, 480, FALSE, 4, 3, 166667,
60  /* 15 */ 1440, 480, FALSE, 16, 9, 166667,
61  /* 16 */ 1920, 1080, FALSE, 16, 9, 166667,
62  /* 17 */ 720, 576, FALSE, 4, 3, 200000,
63  /* 18 */ 720, 576, FALSE, 16, 9, 200000,
64  /* 19 */ 1280, 720, FALSE, 16, 9, 200000,
65  /* 20 */ 1920, 1080, TRUE, 16, 9, 400000,
66  /* 21 */ 720, 576, TRUE, 4, 3, 400000,
67  /* 22 */ 720, 576, TRUE, 16, 9, 400000,
68  /* 23 */ 720, 288, FALSE, 4, 3, 200000,
69  /* 24 */ 720, 288, FALSE, 16, 9, 200000,

167 // byRGB_YCbCr
168 typedef enum _HDMI_PIXEL_ENCODING {
169  HDMI_ENCODING_RGB_444 = 0,
170  HDMI_ENCODING_YUV_422 = 1,
171  HDMI_ENCODING_YUV_444 = 2,
172  HDMI_ENCODING_YUV_420 = 3
173 } HDMI_PXIEL_ENCODING;
174 
180 typedef struct _HDMI_AVI_INFOFRAME_PAYLOAD {
181  BYTE byScanInfo : 2;
182  BYTE byBarDataPresent : 2;
183  BYTE byActiveFormatInfoPresent : 1;
184  BYTE byRGB_YCbCr : 2;
185  BYTE byFutureUseByte1 : 1;
186 
187  BYTE byActivePortionAspectRatio : 4;
188  BYTE byCodedFrameAspectRatio : 2;
189  BYTE byColorimetry : 2;
190 
191  BYTE byNonUniformPictureScaling : 2;
192  BYTE byRGBQuantizationRange : 2;
193  BYTE byExtendedColorimetry : 3;
194  BYTE byITContent : 1;
195 
196  BYTE byVIC : 7;
197  BYTE byFutureUseByte4 : 1;
198 
199  BYTE byPixelRepetitionFactor : 4;
200  BYTE byITContentType : 2;
201  BYTE byYCCQuantizationRange : 2;
202 
203  WORD wEndOfTopBar;
204  WORD wStartOfBottomBar;
205  WORD wEndOfLeftBar;
206  WORD wStartOfRightBar;
207 } HDMI_AVI_INFOFRAME_PAYLOAD;
208 
209 typedef struct _HDMI_HDR_INFOFRAME_PAYLOAD {
210  BYTE byEOTF;
211  BYTE byMetadataDescriptorID;
212 
213  BYTE display_primaries_lsb_x0;
214  BYTE display_primaries_msb_x0;
215  BYTE display_primaries_lsb_y0;
216  BYTE display_primaries_msb_y0;
217 
218  BYTE display_primaries_lsb_x1;
219  BYTE display_primaries_msb_x1;
220  BYTE display_primaries_lsb_y1;
221  BYTE display_primaries_msb_y1;
222 
223  BYTE display_primaries_lsb_x2;
224  BYTE display_primaries_msb_x2;
225  BYTE display_primaries_lsb_y2;
226  BYTE display_primaries_msb_y2;
227 
228  BYTE white_point_lsb_x;
229  BYTE white_point_msb_x;
230  BYTE white_point_lsb_y;
231  BYTE white_point_msb_y;
232 
233  BYTE max_display_mastering_lsb_luminance;
234  BYTE max_display_mastering_msb_luminance;
235  BYTE min_display_mastering_lsb_luminance;
236  BYTE min_display_mastering_msb_luminance;
237 
238  BYTE maximum_content_light_level_lsb;
239  BYTE maximum_content_light_level_msb;
240 
241  BYTE maximum_frame_average_light_level_lsb;
242  BYTE maximum_frame_average_light_level_msb;
243 } HDMI_HDR_INFOFRAME_PAYLOAD;
244 
245 // Audio infoframe
246 #define HDMI_AUDIO_CODING_TYPE_STREAM 0x00
247 #define HDMI_AUDIO_CODING_TYPE_PCM 0x01
248 #define HDMI_AUDIO_CODING_TYPE_AC3 0x02
249 #define HDMI_AUDIO_CODING_TYPE_MPEG1 0x03
250 #define HDMI_AUDIO_CODING_TYPE_MP3 0x04
251 #define HDMI_AUDIO_CODING_TYPE_MPEG2 0x05
252 #define HDMI_AUDIO_CODING_TYPE_AAC_LC 0x06
253 #define HDMI_AUDIO_CODING_TYPE_DTS 0x07
254 #define HDMI_AUDIO_CODING_TYPE_ATRAC 0x08
255 #define HDMI_AUDIO_CODING_TYPE_DSD 0x09
256 #define HDMI_AUDIO_CODING_TYPE_EAC3 0x0A
257 #define HDMI_AUDIO_CODING_TYPE_DTS_HD 0x0B
258 
259 #define HDMI_AUDIO_SAMPLE_SIZE_STREAM 0x00
260 #define HDMI_AUDIO_SAMPLE_SIZE_16BIT 0x01
261 #define HDMI_AUDIO_SAMPLE_SIZE_20BIT 0x02
262 #define HDMI_AUDIO_SAMPLE_SIZE_24BIT 0x03
263 
264 #define HDMI_AUDIO_SAMPLE_RATE_STREAM 0x00
265 #define HDMI_AUDIO_SAMPLE_RATE_32000 0x01
266 #define HDMI_AUDIO_SAMPLE_RATE_44100 0x02
267 #define HDMI_AUDIO_SAMPLE_RATE_48000 0x03
268 #define HDMI_AUDIO_SAMPLE_RATE_88200 0x04
269 #define HDMI_AUDIO_SAMPLE_RATE_96000 0x05
270 #define HDMI_AUDIO_SAMPLE_RATE_176400 0x06
271 #define HDMI_AUDIO_SAMPLE_RATE_192000 0x07
272 
273 static const DWORD g_adwHDMIAudioSampleRate[] = {
274  0,
275  32000,
276  44100,
277  48000,
278  88200,
279  96000,
280  176400,
281  192000
282 };
283 
284 typedef struct _HDMI_AUDIO_INFOFRAME_PAYLOAD {
285  BYTE byChannelCount : 3; // +1 for channel count
286  BYTE byReserved1 : 1;
287  BYTE byAudioCodingType : 4;
288 
289  BYTE bySampleSize : 2;
290  BYTE bySampleFrequency : 3;
291  BYTE byReserved2 : 3;
292 
293  BYTE byAudioCodingExtensionType : 5;
294  BYTE byReserved3 : 3;
295 
296  BYTE byChannelAllocation;
297 
298  BYTE byLFEPlaybackLevel : 2;
299  BYTE byReserved4 : 1;
300  BYTE byLevelShiftValue : 4;
301  BYTE byDownMixInhibitFlag : 1;
302 } HDMI_AUDIO_INFOFRAME_PAYLOAD;
303 
304 // SPD Infoframe
305 #define HDMI_SPD_SORUCE_UNKOWN 0x00
306 #define HDMI_SPD_SORUCE_DIGITAL_STB 0x01
307 #define HDMI_SPD_SORUCE_DVD_PLAYER 0x02
308 #define HDMI_SPD_SORUCE_D_VHS 0x03
309 #define HDMI_SPD_SORUCE_HDD_RECORDER 0x04
310 #define HDMI_SPD_SORUCE_DVC 0x05
311 #define HDMI_SPD_SORUCE_DSC 0x06
312 #define HDMI_SPD_SORUCE_VIDEO_CD 0x07
313 #define HDMI_SPD_SORUCE_GAME 0x08
314 #define HDMI_SPD_SORUCE_PC_GENERAL 0x09
315 #define HDMI_SPD_SORUCE_BLUE_RAY_DISC 0x0A
316 #define HDMI_SPD_SORUCE_SUPER_AUDIO_CD 0x0B
317 #define HDMI_SPD_SORUCE_HD_DVD 0x0C
318 #define HDMI_SPD_SORUCE_PMP 0x0D
319 
320 typedef struct _HDMI_SPD_INFOFRAME_PAYLOAD {
321  CHAR achVendorName[8];
322  CHAR achProductDescription[16];
323  BYTE bySourceInformation;
324 } HDMI_SPD_INFOFRAME_PAYLOAD;
325 
326 // HDMI 1.4b VS Infoframe
327 #define HDMI14B_VS_REGISTRATION_ID 0x000C03
328 
329 #define HDMI14B_VS_FORMAT_NONE 0x00
330 #define HDMI14B_VS_FORMAT_EXT_RES 0x01
331 #define HDMI14B_VS_FORMAT_3D_FORMAT 0x02
332 
333 // by3DStructure
334 #define HDMI14B_3DS_FRAME_PACKING 0x00
335 #define HDMI14B_3DS_FIELD_ALTERNATIVE 0x01
336 #define HDMI14B_3DS_LINE_ALTERNATIVE 0x02
337 #define HDMI14B_3DS_SIDE_BY_SIDE_FULL 0x03
338 #define HDMI14B_3DS_TOP_AND_BOTTOM 0x06
339 #define HDMI14B_3DS_SIDE_BY_SIDE_HALF 0x08
340 
341 // by3DExtData
342 #define HDMI_SUB_SAMPLING_HORIZONTAL_00 0x00
343 #define HDMI_SUB_SAMPLING_HORIZONTAL_01 0x01
344 #define HDMI_SUB_SAMPLING_HORIZONTAL_10 0x02
345 #define HDMI_SUB_SAMPLING_HORIZONTAL_11 0x03
346 #define HDMI_SUB_SAMPLING_QUINCUNX_ODD_ODD 0x04
347 #define HDMI_SUB_SAMPLING_QUINCUNX_ODD_EVEN 0x05
348 #define HDMI_SUB_SAMPLING_QUINCUNX_EVEN_ODD 0x06
349 #define HDMI_SUB_SAMPLING_QUINCUNX_EVEN_EVEN 0x07
350 
351 typedef struct _HDMI14B_VS_DATA_EXT_RES {
352  BYTE byHDMI_VIC;
353 } HDMI14B_VS_DATA_EXT_RES;
354 
355 typedef struct _HDMI14B_VS_DATA_3D_FORMAT {
356  BYTE byReserved1 : 3;
357  BYTE by3DMetaPresent : 1;
358  BYTE by3DStructure : 4;
359 
360  BYTE byReserved2 : 4;
361  BYTE by3DExtData : 4;
362 
363  BYTE by3DMetadataLength : 5;
364  BYTE by3DMetadataType : 3;
365 } HDMI14B_VS_DATA_3D_FORMAT;
366 
367 typedef struct _HDMI14B_VS_DATA {
368  BYTE byReserved1 : 5;
369  BYTE byHDMIVideoFormat : 3;
370 
371  union {
372  HDMI14B_VS_DATA_EXT_RES vsDataExtRes;
373  HDMI14B_VS_DATA_3D_FORMAT vsData3DFormat;
374  };
375 } HDMI14B_VS_DATA;
376 
377 // Generic VS Infoframe
378 typedef struct _HDMI_VS_INFOFRAME_PAYLOAD {
379  BYTE abyRegistrationId[3];
380 
381  union {
382  BYTE abyVSData[24];
383  HDMI14B_VS_DATA vsDataHDMI14B;
384  };
385 
386 public:
387  DWORD GetRegistrationId() {
388  return abyRegistrationId[0] | (abyRegistrationId[1] << 8) | (abyRegistrationId[2] << 16);
389  }
390 
391 } HDMI_VS_INFOFRAME_PAYLOAD;
392 
393 // Generic Infoframe
394 #define HDMI_INFOFRAME_TYPE_ACP 0x04
395 #define HDMI_INFOFRAME_TYPE_ISRC1 0x05
396 #define HDMI_INFOFRAME_TYPE_ISRC2 0x06
397 #define HDMI_INFOFRAME_TYPE_GAMUT 0x0A
398 #define HDMI_INFOFRAME_TYPE_VS 0x81
399 #define HDMI_INFOFRAME_TYPE_AVI 0x82
400 #define HDMI_INFOFRAME_TYPE_SPD 0x83
401 #define HDMI_INFOFRAME_TYPE_AUDIO 0x84
402 #define HDMI_INFOFRAME_TYPE_MS 0x85
403 #define HDMI_INFOFRAME_TYPE_VBI 0x86
404 #define HDMI_INFOFRAME_TYPE_HDR 0x87
405 
412 typedef struct _HDMI_INFOFRAME_HEADER {
413  BYTE byPacketType;
414  BYTE byVersion;
415  BYTE byLength : 5;
416  BYTE byReservedZero : 3;
417 } HDMI_INFOFRAME_HEADER;
418 
425 typedef struct _HDMI_INFOFRAME_PACKET {
426  HDMI_INFOFRAME_HEADER header;
427  BYTE byChecksum;
428 
429  union {
430  BYTE abyPayload[27];
431  HDMI_AVI_INFOFRAME_PAYLOAD aviInfoFramePayload;
432  HDMI_AUDIO_INFOFRAME_PAYLOAD audioInfoFramePayload;
433  HDMI_SPD_INFOFRAME_PAYLOAD spdInfoFramePayload;
434  HDMI_VS_INFOFRAME_PAYLOAD vsInfoFramePayload;
435  HDMI_HDR_INFOFRAME_PAYLOAD hdrInfoFramePayload;
436  };
437 
438 public:
439  BOOLEAN IsValid(
440  ) const {
441  LPBYTE pbyData = (LPBYTE)&header;
442  BYTE cbData = header.byLength + sizeof(header) + 1;
443 
444  BYTE bySum = 0;
445  while (cbData-- != 0)
446  bySum += *pbyData++;
447 
448  return (bySum == 0);
449  }
450 } HDMI_INFOFRAME_PACKET;
451 
452 #pragma pack(pop)
453 #pragma warning(pop)
